name: OpenBankAccount
description: Open bank account API that takes four parameters: 'account', 'password', 'name' and 'email'. The 'account' parameter refers to the user's bank account number, the 'password' parameter refers to the user's password for the account, the 'name' parameter refers to the user's name and 'email' parameter refers to the user's email address.

password.description: The password for the bank account.

email.description: The email address of the user.

name: QueryStock
description: Query stock API that takes two parameters - 'stock_code' and 'time'. The 'stock_code' parameter refers to the code of the stock and the 'time' parameter specifies the time for fetching the stock data.

time.description: The time for fetching the stock data. Format: %Y-%m-%d

name: Wiki
description: Wikipedia search API that takes one parameter - 'keyword'. The 'keyword' parameter refers to the search term to be looked up on Wikipedia.

keyword.description: The keyword to be searched on Wikipedia.

name: Dictionary
description: API that takes a 'query' parameter as input and retrieves the definition of that word.

query.description: The word to search the definition for.

name: QueryHealthData
description: API that retrieves the health data of a user for a specific time period. The 'user_id' parameter is used to identify the user for whom the data is to be fetched and the 'time_period' parameter specifies the time range for which the data should be retrieved.

user_id.description: The ID of the user whose health data is to be retrieved.

time_period.description: The time period for which health data is required in the format %Y-%m-%d to %Y-%m-%d

name: SymptomSearch
description: An API that searches for medical conditions based on symptom descriptions.

symptom_description.description: A description of the symptoms being experienced.

name: AppointmentRegistration
description: Register an appointment API that takes three parameters - 'patient_name', 'doctor_name', and 'appointment_time'. The 'patient_name' parameter refers to the name of the patient who wants to register an appointment, 'doctor_name' refers to the name of the doctor who will take the appointment, and 'appointment_time' specifies the date and time of the appointment.

patient_name.description: The name of the patient who wants to register an appointment.

doctor_name.description: The name of the doctor who will take the appointment.

appointment_time.description: The date and time of the appointment. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

name: QueryRegistration
description: Query registration API that takes two parameters - 'patient_name' and 'appointment_time'. The 'patient_name' parameter refers to the name of the patient who has made the appointment and the 'appointment_time' parameter specifies the time of the appointment.

patient_name.description: The name of the patient who has made the appointment.

appointment_time.description: The time of the appointment. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

name: RecordHealthData
description: Record health history API that takes in three parameters - 'user_id', 'date', and 'health_data'. The 'user_id' parameter refers to the unique identifier of the user whose health history is being recorded. The 'date' parameter specifies the date when the data was recorded. The 'health_data' parameter specifies the data that was recorded, which is an object.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user whose health history is being recorded.

date.description: The date when the data was recorded. Format: %Y-%m-%d

name: PlayMusic
description: Play Music API that takes two parameters - 'song_playlist_name' and 'source'. The 'song_playlist_name' parameter refers to the name of the playlist which contains the songs to be played and the 'source' parameter specifies the location of the music files on the system.

song_playlist_name.description: The name of the playlist to be played.

source.description: The location of the music files on the system.

name: BookHotel
description: Book a hotel API that takes multiple parameters such as 'hotel_name', 'check_in_date', 'check_out_date', 'room_count', 'adult_count', 'child_count'. The 'check_in_date' parameter is the date when the guest is supposed to arrive at the hotel, the 'check_out_date' parameter is the date when the guest is supposed to leave the hotel, 'room_count' parameter is the number of rooms required, 'adult_count' parameter is the count of adults and 'child_count' parameter is the count of children staying in the hotel.

room_count.description: Number of rooms required for stay

adult_count.description: Number of adults staying in the hotel

child_count.description: Number of children staying in the hotel

name: live_giveaways_by_type
description: Retrieve live giveaways from the GamerPower API based on the specified type.

type.description: The type of giveaways to retrieve (e.g., game, loot, beta).

name: webcams_list_category_category_category
description: Fetch a list of webcams based on specified categories.

category.description: Comma-separated list of category names for which webcams are to be fetched. At least one category is required.

lang.description: Language code to localize the results, if available. Defaults to 'en'.

show.description: Specifies the content to be listed in the response. Possible values include 'webcams', 'categories', 'continents', 'countries', 'regions', 'properties'. Defaults to 'webcams:image,location'.

name: language_list
description: Fetches the list of valid languages for the given country using the Real Time News Data API.

country.description: The country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2) of the country to get languages for.

name: doji
description: Fetches a list of stocks having a Doji signal from the specified page using the Toolbench RapidAPI service.

page.description: The page number to fetch the Doji signal stocks from. Defaults to 1.

name: advanced_chart
description: Fetches a real-time advanced chart image from TradingView using specified parameters.

symbol.description: A valid TradingView symbol. Example: 'BINANCE:BTCUSDT', 'BINANCE:BTCUSDTPERP'. Default is 'BINANCE:BTCUSDT'.

studies.description: Indicators to be included on the chart. Supports multiple values such as 'MACD', 'RSI', 'EMA'. Default is 'MACD'.

format.description: The format of the chart image. Supported formats are 'png' and 'jpeg'. Default is 'png'.

theme.description: The color theme of the chart. Supported themes are 'light' and 'dark'. Default is 'dark'.

interval.description: The interval of the chart. Supported intervals include '1m', '3m', '5m', '15m', '30m', '45m', '1h', '2h', '3h', '4h', '1d', '1w'. Default is '1d'.

width.description: The width of the chart image. Minimum is 320. Default is 800.

height.description: The height of the chart image. Minimum is 240. Default is 600.

timezone.description: The timezone for the chart. Default is 'Etc/UTC'. Refer to comprehensive list for other values.

name: hotel_details
description: Fetches detailed information about a specified hotel from the Priceline API.

hotel_id.description: The PPN Hotel ID identifying the desired property.

airport_limit.description: Limit the number of nearby airports included in the response.

promo.description: Flag to include promotional data. Default is False.

photos.description: Flag to include photo data. Default is False.

videos.description: Flag to include video data. Default is False.

guest_score_breakdown.description: Flag to include guest score breakdown data. Default is False.

reviews.description: Flag to include hotel review data. Default is False.

city_limit.description: Limit the number of cities included in the response.

important_info.description: Flag to include extra details about the hotel. Default is False.

recent.description: Flag to include recent sales data. Default is False.

poi_limit.description: Limit the number of points of interest included in the response.

plugins.description: Flag to include plugin information. Default is False.

image_size.description: The size of the images returned. Options are 'small', 'medium', or 'large'.

id_lookup.description: Flag to search non-PPN Hotel IDs. Default is False.

currency.description: The currency format for the results, in ISO 4217 format.

nearby.description: Flag to include nearby location data such as city, airport, and points of interest. Default is False.

name: categorize_job_title
description: Categorizes a given job title using the Toolbench RapidAPI job title categorization service.

title.description: The job title to be categorized.

name: stock_recommendation_trend
description: Fetches stock recommendation trends using the Yahoo Finance API.

symbol.description: The stock symbol for which to fetch recommendation trends.

name: crypto_exchanges
description: Fetches the list of cryptocurrency exchanges available at Twelve Data API.

format.description: The desired response format. Acceptable values are 'json' (default) and 'csv'.

name: seasonendconstructorstanding
description: Fetches the Constructor Standings at the end of the specified Formula 1 season.

year.description: The year for which to fetch the constructor standings.

name: geocodingsearch
description: Performs a forward geocoding search using a free-form query string and optional parameters to specify query filters and output format.

q.description: Free-form query string for the geocoding search.

countrycodes.description: Two-letter country code as defined in ISO 3166-1 alpha2 to restrict search to a specific country.

json_callback.description: Name of JSON callback function for JSONP calls; use this when the format is set to JSON.

polygon_text.description: Include a textual representation of the polygon geometry in the output.

namedetails.description: Include detailed naming information in the output.

limit.description: Limit the number of search results.

viewbox.description: Specify a bounding box for the search area in the format 'x1,y1,x2,y2', where x is longitude and y is latitude.

format.description: Output format of the response (e.g., JSON).

polygon_geojson.description: Include GeoJSON representation of the polygon geometry in the output.

bounded.description: Use '1' to restrict the search area to the specified viewbox.

polygon_svg.description: Include SVG representation of the polygon geometry in the output.

polygon_kml.description: Include KML representation of the polygon geometry in the output.

polygon_threshold.description: Simplification threshold for the polygon geometry.

accept_language.description: Set the query and response language using two-letter language codes (e.g., 'en' or 'es') or a combination of language and region code (e.g., 'en-GB' or 'es-AR'). Default is 'en'.

addressdetails.description: Include detailed address information in the output.

name: get_by_imdb_id
description: Fetch movie or TV show information by IMDb ID using the specified RapidAPI key.

i.description: A valid IMDb ID for the movie or TV show.

name: search_by_genre
description: Discover movies by genre using the RapidAPI.

with_genres.description: The genre code to filter movies by. Defaults to '80'.

page.description: The page number of results to retrieve. Defaults to 1.

name: search_torrents
description: Search for torrents based on given keywords using the RapidAPI service.

quantity.description: Number of torrent results to return. Maximum value is 40.

page.description: Page number for paginated results. Defaults to 1.

name: fixtures_by_date
description: Fetches rugby match fixtures and results for a specific date using the RapidAPI service. If no date is provided, the default date is set to '2023-02-04'.

date.description: The date for which to retrieve fixtures and results, in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD'. Defaults to '2023-02-04' if not provided.

name: getchapter
description: Fetches a specific chapter from a specified book of the Bible using the Ajith Holy Bible API.

book.description: The name of the book from the Bible.

chapter.description: The chapter number from the specified book.

name: search_title
description: Searches for books by a given title using the Open Library API.

title.description: The title of the book to search for.

name: products
description: Fetch products from the Facebook Marketplace using the RapidAPI.

no_of_save.description: Minimum number of saves for the listed items. Defaults to 25.

min_sales.description: Minimum number of sales for the listed items. Defaults to 5.

min_price.description: Minimum price for the listed items. Defaults to '2.00'.

category.description: Category of the listed items. Defaults to 'Apparel'.

city.description: City where the items are listed. Defaults to 'New York'.

page.description: Page number for pagination. Defaults to 1.

name: channel_videos
description: Fetches videos from a specified YouTube channel using RapidAPI.

is_id.description: YouTube channel ID, default is 'UC-lHJZR3Gqxm24_Vd_AJ5Yw'.

hl.description: Language parameter for the results, default is 'en'.

filter.description: Filter key to determine the type of videos returned. Can be 'videos_latest', 'streams_latest', 'shorts_latest', or 'live_now'. Default is None.

cursor.description: Cursor for pagination, default is None.

name: get_coin_price_difference
description: Fetches the price difference of a specified cryptocurrency from the Crypto Arbitrage Trading API using the provided RapidAPI key.

name.description: The name of the cryptocurrency for which to fetch the price difference.

name: search_php
description: Search for geocoding information using the specified Geokeo Forward Geocoding API.

api.description: The API key for accessing the Geokeo Forward Geocoding service.

q.description: The address or location query string to be geocoded.

name: channel_details
description: Retrieves detailed information about a YouTube channel using the RapidAPI YouTube Data API.

is_id.description: The ID of the YouTube channel to retrieve details for.

hl.description: The language code for the response (default is 'en').

gl.description: The country code for the response (default is 'US').

name: drivers
description: Fetches a list of all drivers for a given season using the F1 Live Motorsport Data API.

season_id.description: The ID of the season for which to list the drivers.

name: clubs_list_by_competition
description: Fetches the list of clubs in a specific competition using the specified competition ID and domain.

is_id.description: The ID of the competition to fetch the list of clubs for. This value is returned from the .../search or .../competitions/list endpoints.

domain.description: The domain to use for the request. It should be one of the following: 'com', 'de', 'be', 'es', 'it', 'nl', 'pl', 'pt', 'com.tr', 'world'. Defaults to 'de'.

name: listofallcircuitswithinaraceinayear
description: Fetches a list of all circuits within a race for a given year from the Formula 1 API.

round.description: The round number/name of the race within the year.

year.description: The year of the race season.

name: get_specific_pizza
description: Fetches a specific pizza by its ID from the RapidAPI service.

is_id.description: The ID of the pizza to retrieve.

name: stock_get_stock_price
description: Retrieve the current stock price for a given ticker symbol from the Yahoo! Finance API.

symbol.description: The ticker symbol of the stock. For example, "AAPL" is the ticker symbol for Apple Inc.

region.description: The market region of the ticker symbol. Allowed values are 'US', 'BR', 'AU', 'CA', 'FR', 'DE', 'HK', 'IN', 'IT', 'ES', 'GB', 'S'. Defaults to 'US'.

name: recipe_search_and_recommendations
description: Search for recipes and provide recommendations based on given keywords and filters.

q.description: The keyword to search for in the recipe database. Defaults to 'chicken'.

r.description: Optional filter parameter for the search.

name: detailed_food_recipe_by_id
description: Fetch a detailed Mexican food recipe by its unique ID using the specified RapidAPI key.

is_id.description: Unique identifier for the Mexican food recipe.

name: get_all_food
description: Fetches a list of Ghanaian foods including ingredients and a short description from the specified API endpoint.

page.description: The page number to request data from. Default is '?page=2'.

name: v1_cocktail
description: Fetches cocktail information from the API Ninjas Cocktail API based on the provided cocktail name or ingredients.

name.description: The name of the cocktail to search for. This parameter supports partial matches (default is 'bloody mary').

ingredients.description: A comma-separated string of ingredients to search for. Only cocktails containing all listed ingredients will be returned (default is None).

name: super_lig_standings
description: Fetches the standings of the Super Lig for a specific season using the RapidAPI service.

season.description: The season for which standings are required. Example: '2022'. If not provided, the current season's standings will be fetched.

name: prematchform
description: Retrieve the pre-match form for a specific baseball match using its match ID.

is_id.description: The ID of the baseball match for which to retrieve the pre-match form.

name: actors_list_born_today
description: Fetches a list of actors and actresses born on a specific day and month from the Online Movie Database via the RapidAPI platform.

month.description: The month of birth of the actors.

day.description: The day of birth of the actors.

name: topic_headlines
description: Fetches the latest news headlines for a specified topic.

topic.description: The topic for which to get news headlines. Available topics include:

lang.description: The language for the results, specified as a 2-letter language code (ISO 639-1 alpha-2). Default is 'en'.

country.description: The country code for filtering the results (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). Default is 'US'.

name: get_user_profile
description: Fetches the user profile from the Pinterest API using the provided username.

username.description: The Pinterest username for which to retrieve the profile information.

name: popular_posts
description: Fetches popular posts from Reddit based on the given sort type.

sort.description: The sorting method for the posts. Accepted values are 'new' and 'hot'.

cursor.description: An optional cursor for pagination to fetch the next set of results. Defaults to None.

name: current_block_number
description: Retrieve the current block number of the Binance Smart Chain.

network.description: The network to query, either 'mainnet' or 'testnet'. Defaults to None.

name: stories_list
description: Retrieves a list of stories related to a specific sticker using the BB Finance API.

template.description: The category of the sticker, which can be one of the following: COMMODITY, CURRENCY, INDEX, INDEXFUTURE, RATE, or STOCK.

is_id.description: The value of the 'id' field returned by the /market/auto-complete endpoint.

name: download_video_or_reel
description: Downloads Facebook video or reel links in HD and SD formats.

url.description: The URL of the Facebook video or reel to be downloaded.

name: track_package
description: Tracks a package's shipping details using a provided tracking number and the Toolbench RapidAPI service.

tracking_number.description: The tracking number of the package to be tracked.

name: list_comments
description: Fetches comments for the specified TikTok post using the given parameters.

aweme_id.description: The ID of the TikTok post for which to retrieve comments.

count.description: The number of comments to retrieve. Defaults to 10.

cursor.description: The position from where to start retrieving comments. Defaults to 0.

proxy.description: The proxy server to use for the request. Defaults to None.

name: time_zone_api
description: Fetches up-to-date time zone and local time information as JSON based on a given query parameter.

q.description: Query parameter to fetch time zone data.

name: news_latest_page
description: Fetches the latest news stories in chronological order, filtered by the specified page ID.

page_id.description: The identifier for the specific news page to filter the stories.

name: independent_albums
description: Retrieves the Independent Albums chart for a specified week from the Billboard API.

week.description: The week for which to retrieve the chart, in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD'. If not provided, defaults to the previous week. If the provided date is not a Saturday, it will default to the preceding Saturday of that week.

name: domain
description: Checks if a given domain is disposable using the Mailcheck API.

domain.description: The domain to check for disposability.

name: team_list
description: Fetches and returns a list of sports teams from the SportScore API.

page.description: Page number for pagination. Defaults to 1.

name: countries_list
description: Returns a list of countries where Asos supports selling products.

lang.description: The language code for the country names. Defaults to 'en-US'.

name: last_menstrual_period_lmp
description: Calculates the estimated due date based on the user's last menstrual period (LMP).

cycle_length.description: The average length of the user's menstrual cycle in days.

last_period_date.description: The date of the user's last menstrual period in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

name: get_current_weather
description: Retrieves the current weather for a specified city using the Cloud Cast API.

city.description: The name of the city for which to retrieve the weather.

name: get_5_year_historical_monthly_prices
description: Fetch 5-year historical monthly stock prices for a given ticker symbol.

ticker.description: The stock ticker symbol for which historical data is to be fetched.

name: basic_daily
description: Fetch daily 10-Q and 10-K report zip files from the SEC financial statement dataset.

date.description: The specific date for which to fetch the daily zip file, formatted as 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

name: current_weather_data_of_a_location
description: Fetch the current weather data for a given location based on longitude and latitude.

name: current_air_quality
description: Fetches the current air quality conditions for a given location specified by its longitude and latitude.

lon.description: Longitude of the location for which to retrieve air quality data.

lat.description: Latitude of the location for which to retrieve air quality data.

name: v1_jokes
description: Fetches a set number of jokes from the API Ninjas Jokes API endpoint.

limit.description: The number of jokes to return, with a valid range of 1 to 30. Defaults to None, which returns a single joke.

name: list_replies_by_comment
description: Fetches replies to a specific comment on a given TikTok video using the RapidAPI service.

aweme_id.description: The ID of the TikTok video.

comment_id.description: The ID of the comment for which replies are being retrieved.

count.description: The number of replies to retrieve. Defaults to 10.

cursor.description: The starting point for pagination. Defaults to 0.

proxy.description: Proxy server to use for the request. Defaults to None.

name: get_balance
description: Fetch the balance of a specific token for a given address using the PancakeSwap API.

address.description: The address for which to retrieve the token balance.

token.description: The token for which the balance is to be retrieved.

name: get_video_info
description: Gets video download links and other relevant information in JSON format for a given YouTube video ID.

is_id.description: The YouTube video ID for which to fetch information.

geo.description: The country code in ISO 3166 format of the end user. Defaults to None.

name: canvas_genres_list
description: Fetches a list of genres in the canvas category from the Webtoon API.

language.description: The language in which to return the genres. Acceptable values are 'en', 'zh-hant', 'de', 'fr', 'es', 'th', and 'id'. Default is 'en'.

name: domain_seo_analysis
description: Fetch popular SEO metrics for a specified domain name, optionally considering the search from a specific country's perspective.

domain.description: The domain name to analyze for SEO metrics.

country.description: Specify the proxy location for the search. Supported countries include 'US', 'CA', 'IE', 'GB', 'FR', 'DE', 'SE', 'IN', 'JP', 'KR', 'SG', 'AU', 'BR'. Defaults to 'us'.

name: open_high_low_close_ohlc_price
description: Gets the open, high, low, and close prices for a given symbol and date by querying the API.

symbols.description: The three-letter currency code or commodity code for which to get the price data.

date.description: The date for which to retrieve the price data.

base.description: The three-letter currency code or commodity code of the base currency.

name: matchdetails
description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific ice hockey match using the provided match ID.

is_id.description: The ID of the ice hockey match for which to retrieve details.

name: products_get_reviews
description: Fetches brief reviews of a product from the Shein API.

goods_spu.description: The value of 'productRelationID' returned in the /products/list or /products/search endpoints. Defaults to 'm22022854841'.

cat_id.description: The value of 'cat_id' returned in the /products/list or /products/search endpoints. Defaults to '1727'.

sku.description: The value of 'goods_sn' returned in the /products/list or /products/search endpoints. Defaults to 'rm2202285484176751'.

goods_id.description: The value of 'goods_id' field returned in the /products/list or /products/search endpoints. Defaults to '10196865'.

language.description: The 2-letter language code. Defaults to 'en'.

name: get_4_date_endpoint
description: Fetches the exchange rates for specified currencies on a given date.

base.description: The base currency for which to get the exchange rates.

symbols.description: A comma-separated string of target currencies to get exchange rates for.

date.description: The date for which to fetch the exchange rates in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format. Defaults to '2023-02-01'.

name: receive_the_credit_card_data
description: Fetch credit card data from a simulated API based on the specified card type.

visa_type.description: Type of visa card to generate. Defaults to 'visa'. Valid options include 'amex', 'diners', 'discover', 'jcb', 'jcb15', 'jcb16', 'maestro', 'mastercard', 'visa', 'visa13', 'visa16', 'visa19'.

name: v1_airquality
description: Fetches air quality data from the API Ninjas Air Quality API based on provided location parameters.

zip.description: ZIP code of the desired location.

city.description: Name of the city. Defaults to 'Seattle'.

lon.description: Longitude of the desired location. Must be used in conjunction with `lat`.

lat.description: Latitude of the desired location. Must be used in conjunction with `lon`.

name: search_by_engine
description: Search for airplanes that have engines matching the given keyword.

engine_icontains.description: Keyword to search for in the airplane engine descriptions.

name: search_music
description: Searches for music based on the provided keywords using the TikTok API.

keywords.description: The search terms to look for in the music database.

count.description: The number of results to return, with a maximum of 30. Defaults to 5.

cursor.description: The cursor for pagination to get the next set of results. Defaults to None.

name: get_all_players
description: Retrieves all players from all seasons using the Free NBA API.

page.description: The page number for pagination. Defaults to '0'.

per_page.description: The number of results returned per call for pagination. Defaults to '25'.

search.description: A string to filter players based on their name. For example, `search="davis"` will return players that have 'davis' in their first or last name. Defaults to None.

name: match
description: Fetch the detailed information of an individual tennis match using the provided match ID from the Tennis Live Data API.

match_id.description: The unique identifier for the tennis match to retrieve information for.

name: image_to_text_ocr
description: Extracts text from an image using the Google Lens OCR API and provides detailed detections at the paragraph, sentence, and word levels.

url.description: The URL of the image from which to extract text.

language.description: The language of the results, specified as a 2-letter ISO 639-1 code (e.g., 'en' for English). Defaults to 'en'.

name: top_athletes
description: Fetches the top athletes based on the provided parameters by making a request to the allscores API.

langid.description: The language id to use in the request.

limit.description: The number of athletes to return.

sporttype.description: The sport type for which to fetch top athletes.

name: get_video_urls
description: Retrieves video or shorts URLs from YouTube using a provided video ID.

is_id.description: The YouTube video ID for which the URLs are to be fetched.

name: product_offers
description: Fetch all offers available for a specific product, given its product ID, and optional country and language preferences.

product_id.description: The ID of the product for which to fetch offers.

country.description: Country code of the region/country to return offers for. Default is 'us'. Valid values can be found at https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2.

language.description: The language of the results. Default is 'en'. Valid values can be found at https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_ISO_639-1_codes.

name: hotel_reviews
description: Fetches a list of hotel reviews based on the provided parameters using the Priceline API.

hotel_id.description: The PPN Hotel ID identifying the desired property.

languages.description: Comma-separated language codes to filter the reviews by language. Defaults to 'en,fr'.

order_by.description: Comma-separated sorting order metrics. Valid options include creation_date, average_rating, or verified_guest followed by .asc or .desc.

offset.description: The number of reviews to skip before starting to return results. Used in conjunction with `limit`. Defaults to None.

limit.description: Limits the number of reviews returned. Defaults to 100.

only_verified_guests.description: If set to True, only includes reviews from verified guests. Defaults to None.

name: get_radio_playlist
description: Fetches a radio playlist for a given artist or song using the Spotify API.

uri.description: The URI of the artist or song for which to generate the radio playlist.

name: all_songs_from_artist
description: Retrieves all songs by the specified artist using the Toolbench RapidAPI service.

artist.description: The name of the artist whose songs are to be retrieved.

name: gettotalsolved
description: Fetches the total number of questions solved by the given LeetCode user.

username.description: The LeetCode username of the user whose solved questions are to be retrieved.

name: jokes
description: Fetches jokes from the Jokester API, optionally filtered by category.

category.description: Category to filter jokes by. Defaults to None.

name: keto_recipes_by_difficulty
description: Fetches all keto recipes filtered by difficulty level.

difficulty.description: The difficulty level of the recipes to retrieve (Easy, Medium, or Difficult).

name: fixtures_by_series
description: Fetches fixtures and results for a given cricket series using the RapidAPI service.

series_id.description: The unique identifier for the cricket series.

name: menudetails
description: Fetches menu details for a given venue from the RapidAPI endpoint.

lang.description: The language code for the menu details.

is_id.description: The unique identifier for the venue.

name: get_coordinates
description: This function sends a GET request to the "/geocode" endpoint to obtain the geographical coordinates of a given address using the RapidAPI service.

address.description: The address or place to geocode. Defaults to '1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA'.

name: get_trip_plan
description: Generates a trip plan based on the number of days and destination provided.

days.description: The number of days for the trip.

name: airports_nonstop_routes_for_an_airport
description: Fetches a list of nonstop routes for a specified airport using the RapidAPI service.

airportiatacode.description: The IATA code for the airport.

name: spac_price_targets
description: Fetches the latest SPAC (Special Purpose Acquisition Company) price targets from analysts, filtered by a specific SPAC symbol.

symbol.description: The SPAC symbol to filter the price targets by. Defaults to 'SOFI'.

name: market_auto_complete
description: Fetch auto-complete suggestions for stock market queries.

query.description: The search query for which auto-complete suggestions are needed.

name: news_v2_list_by_symbol
description: Fetches the latest news articles associated with a given stock symbol.

symbol.description: The stock symbol for which to retrieve news. This is typically obtained from the auto-complete or other relevant endpoints.

page.description: The page number for paginated results. Defaults to 1.

pagesize.description: The number of news articles to return per page. Defaults to 30.

name: song_download
description: Downloads a song from the provided SoundCloud URL using the specified RapidAPI key.

track_url.description: The URL of the SoundCloud track to be downloaded.

name: music_search
description: Searches for music or audio names and retrieves artists' cover images and sound URLs.

query.description: The search term for the music or audio, typically including the artist or movie name.

name: get_live_streams_livestreamid
description: Retrieves live stream details using the given livestream ID from the RapidAPI service.

livestreamid.description: The ID of the live stream to fetch details for.

name: getmediumquestion
description: Fetches the number of medium-level questions solved by the given user from the LeetCode API.

username.description: The username of the LeetCode user whose medium-level questions solved count is to be fetched.

name: taobao_search_by_keyword
description: Search for products on Taobao using a specified keyword and return the search results.

page.description: The page number to retrieve from the search results.

keyword.description: The search keyword to use for querying products.

name: get_types
description: Fetches available types for a specified period from the horoscopes API.

period.description: The time period for which to retrieve the available types (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly).

name: artist_singles
description: Fetches the singles of an artist from the Spotify API.

is_id.description: The ID of the artist whose singles are to be fetched.

offset.description: The index of the first single to return. Defaults to '0'.

limit.description: The maximum number of singles to return. Defaults to '20'.

name: stock_balance_sheet
description: Retrieves the balance sheet data for a specified stock symbol using the Yahoo Finance API.

symbol.description: The stock symbol for which to retrieve the balance sheet data.

name: v1_helicopter
description: Fetches a list of helicopter specifications from the API Ninjas Helicopter API that match the given parameters.

max_height.description: Maximum height of the helicopter in feet.

limit.description: How many results to return. Must be between 1 and 30. Default is 1.

min_height.description: Minimum height of the helicopter in feet.

max_length.description: Maximum length of the helicopter in feet.

min_length.description: Minimum length of the helicopter in feet.

min_speed.description: Minimum maximum air speed in knots.

min_range.description: Minimum range of the helicopter in nautical miles.

max_range.description: Maximum range of the helicopter in nautical miles.

max_speed.description: Maximum maximum air speed in knots.

manufacturer.description: Company that designed and built the helicopter. Default is 'Bell'.

name: recent_unique_tournaments
description: Fetches the recent unique tournaments associated with a given team ID using the RapidAPI service.

team_id.description: The ID of the team for which recent unique tournaments are to be retrieved.

name: getquestionsbyexam
description: Fetches exam questions for a specified exam using the Tech Exams API.

exam.description: The exam identifier for which the questions are to be retrieved.

name: get_brands
description: Fetches cigar brands from the RapidAPI endpoint, allowing for pagination and optional search filtering.

page.description: The page number to retrieve for pagination.

search.description: A search term to filter cigar brands. Defaults to 'Dominican'.

name: social_media_caption
description: Generates catchy captions for social media based on the provided name and description.

name.description: The name associated with the social media content.

description.description: A brief description of the social media content.

name: quote_get_option_fundamentals
description: Fetch the option fundamentals for a given stock symbol using the specified RapidAPI key.

symbol.description: The stock symbol for which to retrieve option fundamentals.

name: stock_price
description: Fetches the current price and details for a given public stock using the RapidAPI service.

ticker.description: The ticker symbol of the stock for which to retrieve the price and details.

name: competitions
description: Fetches information about football competitions using the Premier League Upcoming Matches API.

name.description: Name of the league (default is 'Premier League').

name: search_wikihow
description: Searches for a 'how-to' question on WikiHow and returns summarized methods and steps.

q.description: A 'how-to' question to search on WikiHow, e.g., 'find meaning in life', 'learn any language', 'play soccer', 'change an oil filter'.

name: venue_search
description: Searches for venues based on latitude, longitude, and optional radius using the Wiman API.

latitude.description: The latitude of the location to search.

longitude.description: The longitude of the location to search.

radius.description: The search radius in kilometers. Defaults to 1.

name: get_a_list_of_suburbs
description: Fetches all matching suburbs for the provided postcode, including state, and optionally latitude and longitude if available.

postcode.description: The postcode for which to find matching suburbs.

name: stock_quotes
description: Fetches real-time stock quotes for given company symbols.

symbols.description: Comma-separated list of stock symbols for which to retrieve real-time quotes.

name: get_u_54_athlete_ranking
description: Fetches the under-54 athlete ranking for Taekwondo from the provided RapidAPI service.

country.description: The country to filter the athlete rankings. Defaults to None.

name: flame
description: Calculates the FLAMES relationship compatibility score for two given names using the Flames Love Calculator API.

sname.description: The second name to be used in the compatibility calculation.

fname.description: The first name to be used in the compatibility calculation.

name: searchjobs
description: Fetches a list of job postings from the Indeed API for Sweden.

location.description: The city or state within Sweden to search for jobs.

offset.description: The starting point for pagination; must be increased by 10 to retrieve subsequent pages.

keyword.description: The search keyword (e.g., job title or skill).

name: get_campaign_lead_from_id
description: Retrieve lead information from a campaign using its ID via the Fomo API.

is_id.description: The ID of the campaign to retrieve the lead information from.

name: radical_stroke_number
description: Fetches advanced search results from the Kanji Alive API based on the radical stroke number.

rs.description: The radical stroke number to search for. Should be a positive integer represented as a string.

name: full_stock_price
description: Fetches the current stock price for a given symbol using the Toolbench RapidAPI.

symbol.description: The stock symbol to query.

name: linearregintercept
description: Calculates the linear regression intercept for the specified symbol and interval using the specified parameters and the Twelve Data API.

symbol.description: The instrument symbol (e.g., equity, index, ETF, forex, or cryptocurrency) to calculate the intercept for.

interval.description: The interval between two consecutive data points in the time series (e.g., `1min`, `5min`, `15min`, etc.).

series_type.description: The type of series to consider (e.g., `open`, `high`, `low`, `close`). Default is `close`.

time_period.description: The period of time over which to calculate the intercept. Default is 9.

format.description: The format of the returned data (`csv` or `json`). Default is `json`.

outputsize.description: The number of data points to retrieve. Default is 30.

name: get_status_cat_image
description: Fetches an image of a cat corresponding to the provided HTTP status code.

status.description: The HTTP status code for which to fetch the cat image. Common codes are 200, 404, 500, etc.

name: item_by_id
description: Fetch an item from the Hacker News API by its unique ID.

is_id.description: The unique identifier of the item to retrieve.

name: get_by_trakt_tv_id
description: Fetches movie or TV show information from the RapidAPI MDB List service based on a given Trakt.tv ID.

t.description: A valid Trakt.tv ID representing the movie or TV show.

m.description: The media type, either 'movie' or 'show'. Defaults to 'movie' if not specified.

name: forex_pairs_list
description: Fetches a list of available forex pairs from the Twelve Data API, with optional filters for base currency, symbol, response format, and quote currency.

currency_base.description: Filter the results by base currency. Defaults to 'EUR'.

symbol.description: Filter the results by symbol. Optional.

format.description: The format of the response. Can be 'json' or 'csv'. Defaults to 'json'.

currency_quote.description: Filter the results by quote currency. Optional.

name: get_the_stock_history_by_code
description: Retrieves the stock history for a given stock code and date using the RapidAPI service.

date.description: The specific date to get the stock history for, in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

stockcode.description: The stock code for which to retrieve the historical data.

name: airportstatistics
description: Returns detailed airport statistics for a specified airport based on provided identifiers.

ident.description: The ident of the airport, as returned by /airport/search.

localid.description: Local identifiers of the airport, available mostly for the US & CA (FAA-ID). Max length is 6.

iata.description: The IATA code of the airport, must have a length of 3.

icao.description: The ICAO code of the airport, must have a length of 4.

name: analysis
description: Analyzes, validates, and parses the content of a given phone number using the Metropolis API.

telephone.description: The full telephone number to be analyzed.

country.description: ISO 2-letter country code or name of the country in English. Defaults to 'US'.

name: retrieve_aggregated_loan_offers
description: Retrieves the aggregated loan offers for a specified collection using the Blur API.

collection.description: The name or identifier of the collection for which to retrieve aggregated loan offers.

name: stock_get_stock_quote_type_data
description: Fetch stock quote type data for a given stock symbol and region using the specified RapidAPI key.

symbol.description: The ticker symbol for the stock (e.g., "AAPL" for Apple Inc.).

region.description: The region code for the stock market. Default is 'US'. Allowed values are 'US', 'BR', 'AU', 'CA', 'FR', 'DE', 'HK', 'IN', 'IT', 'ES', 'GB', 'S'.

name: gera_mapa_dos_arredores
description: Generates a map of the surroundings for a given CNPJ (Brazilian company identifier). This function allows customization of the map through various parameters such as height, zoom, width, scale, and type.

cnpj.description: The CNPJ of the company to generate the map for.

height.description: The height of the map. Defaults to None.

zoom.description: The zoom level of the map. Defaults to None.

width.description: The width of the map. Defaults to None.

scale.description: The scale of the map. Defaults to None.

type.description: The type of the map (e.g., 'hybrid'). Defaults to 'hybrid'.

name: defaultroot
description: Fetches cat facts from the MeowFacts API based on the provided parameters.

count.description: The number of cat facts to return. If not specified, a default number of facts will be returned.

factid.description: An optional ID to retrieve a specific cat fact. If not specified, random facts will be returned.

lang.description: The locale in which to retrieve the cat facts. Defaults to 'eng' (English).

name: shopify_store_products
description: Retrieve all products from a Shopify store using the specified API.

page.description: The page number to retrieve products from.

url.description: The base URL of the Shopify store.

name: get_job_details
description: Fetch detailed job information from a given job URL, optionally including skills, using the ToolBench RapidAPI service.

job_url.description: The URL to the job posting.

include_skills.description: Flag to include skills in the fetched details. Defaults to 'false'. Including skills will cost 1 more credit.

name: video_related_contents
description: Fetches related video contents from YouTube using the RapidAPI service.

hl.description: Language code for the response (default is 'en').

is_id.description: The YouTube video ID for which related contents are to be fetched (default is 'kJQP7kiw5Fk').

gl.description: Country code for the response (default is 'US').

cursor.description: Token for pagination to retrieve the next set of results.

name: summary
description: Fetches a summary of SEO metrics for a given URL using the Toolbench RapidAPI service.

url.description: The URL of the website for which the SEO summary is to be fetched.

name: estimates
description: Retrieves estimates for a specified stock symbol using the Holistic Finance API.

symbol.description: The stock symbol for which to retrieve estimates.

name: spac_top_10_rankings
description: Fetches the top 10 SPAC (Special Purpose Acquisition Company) rankings based on specified criteria such as gainers, losers, and volume leaders for a given period and equity type.

sortby.description: Criteria to sort the rankings by. Can be 'gainers', 'losers', or 'volume'.

period.description: Time period to consider for the rankings. Can be 'daily', 'weekly', or 'monthly'.

type.description: Type of SPAC equity. Can be 'common', 'unit', or 'warrant'.

name: multi_search
description: Performs a multi-search on Genius based on the given query, returning paginated results.

per_page.description: The number of results to return per request. Defaults to 3.

page.description: The number of results to return per request. Defaults to 3.

text_format.description: The format for text bodies related to the document. Can be one or more of `dom`, `plain`, `markdown`, and `html`, separated by commas. Defaults to None.

name: artist_related
description: Fetches related artists information from the Spotify API using a given artist ID.

is_id.description: The Spotify artist ID for which to find related artists.

name: get_field_and_field_invite_id
description: Fetches the field and field invite IDs for a given document from the SignNow API.

document_id.description: The ID of the document for which to retrieve field and field invite IDs.

name: fights
description: Fetches fights for either upcoming or previous events from the Spectation Sports Events API.

outcome.description: The outcome of the fights to filter by. Defaults to None.

sport.description: The type of sport to filter the fights by. Defaults to None.

type.description: The type of fights to fetch (e.g., 'upcoming' or 'previous'). Defaults to 'upcoming'.

category.description: The category or weight division of the fights. Defaults to None.

event.description: The ID of the event to fetch fights for. Defaults to None.

page.description: The page number of results to retrieve. Defaults to 1.

fighter.description: The ID of the fighter to fetch fights for. Defaults to None.

name: realtime_weather_api
description: Fetches current weather information based on the provided query parameter.

q.description: Query parameter used to specify the location for which weather data is required. It can be in various formats such as:

name: getstatsbyyear
description: Retrieves Trinidad & Tobago Covid-19 statistics by year.

is_id.description: The year for which the Covid-19 statistics are being requested. Must be between 2020 and the current year.

name: youtube_topviews_year
description: Retrieves the top-viewed YouTube videos for a specified year or for all time.

year.description: The year for which to retrieve the top-viewed YouTube videos. Use an empty string to retrieve all-time top views.

name: tag_search
description: Fetches news articles based on the provided tag from the India Today API.

tag.description: The tag or keyword to search for in the news articles.

name: latest
description: Fetches the latest news from Google News for a specified language region.

lr.description: Language region to get news for, e.g., 'en-US'.

name: airports_direct_routes_for_an_airport
description: Returns a list of direct routes for a given airport using the RapidAPI service.

airportiatacode.description: The IATA code of the airport for which the direct routes are being queried.

name: us_ky
description: Fetches current or historical gas price data for Kentucky.

date.description: The date for which to retrieve gas price data in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD'. If not provided, current gas prices are returned.

name: district_detail_and_coordinates_of_specific_division
description: Fetches detailed information about the districts, coordinates, and upazilas of a specific division from the BDAPI.

division_name.description: The name of the division for which to fetch details.

name: session
description: Fetches the session details for a given `session_id` from the Races endpoint on the F1 Live Motorsport Data API. This includes information such as drivers' times, session weather, speed traps, and session status and is updated throughout each session.

session_id.description: The ID of the session for which details are being retrieved.

name: get_markets_of_coin
description: Fetches the top 50 markets for a given cryptocurrency coin.

is_id.description: The ID of the cryptocurrency coin.

name: game_odds_by_category_schedule
description: Fetches the schedule of game odds for a given sport and category from the sportsbook-odds API.

category.description: The category of the odds. For example, 0 for moneylines, 1 for spreads, 2 for over/under, etc.

sport.description: The sport for which to fetch the game odds schedule.

name: wnba_standings
description: Fetches the WNBA team standings for a given year, with optional grouping.

year.description: The year for which the standings are to be fetched.

group.description: The group name for standings, either 'league' or 'conference'. Defaults to 'league'.

name: geocode_city
description: Retrieves the latitude and longitude coordinates of a given city using the Maps.co Geocoding API.

name: matchstreakodds
description: Fetch odds data related to streaks for a specific football match using its ID.

is_id.description: The ID of the match for which the streaks odds data is to be retrieved.

name: tournament_matches_by_date
description: Retrieves all matches for a specified tournament on a given date using the Tennis Live Data API.

date.description: The date for which to retrieve the matches, formatted as 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

name: spac_sec_filings
description: Fetches the latest SPAC SEC filings, optionally filtered by a given SPAC symbol.

symbol.description: The SPAC symbol to filter the SEC filings by. Defaults to 'ITAC'.

name: onyomi_reading
description: Fetches Kanji information based on the provided Onyomi (O-N) reading using the KanjiaLive API.

on.description: The Onyomi reading of the Kanji, provided in Katakana or romaji.

name: straddle
description: This function retrieves the straddle data for a given stock ticker from the RapidAPI stock and options trading data provider.

ticker.description: The stock ticker symbol for which to retrieve straddle data.

name: query_for_city_boundary_by_name
description: Queries the city boundary information by the given city name using the Boundaries API.

name.description: The name of the city for which to query boundary information.

name: get_from_yts
description: Fetches torrent data from YTS for a given search topic using RapidAPI.

searchtopic.description: The topic or keyword to search for on YTS.

name: getpostcode
description: Retrieve details for a given UK postcode using the RapidAPI service.

postcode.description: The UK postcode to be queried.

name: transaction
description: Fetches full data for a specific transaction on the Optimism blockchain.

hash.description: The hash of the transaction to scan.

network.description: The network to use (mainnet or testnet). Defaults to None.

name: getchanneldetails
description: Fetch detailed information and insights about a specific YouTube channel using its ID.

is_id.description: The unique ID of the YouTube channel to fetch details for.

name: about_channel
description: Fetches detailed information about a YouTube channel using its ID.

is_id.description: The ID of the YouTube channel for which information is being fetched.

name: airports_by_keyword
description: Fetches a list of airport names and their IATA codes that match the given keyword.

keyword.description: A search term to match against airport names and IATA codes.

name: search_exact_phrase_api
description: Searches the King James Version (KJV) of the Bible for the exact phrase supplied and returns the result.

phrase.description: The exact phrase to search for in the KJV Bible.

name: video_search
description: Search for videos relevant to a given query using the Bing Video Search API.

safesearch.description: A filter used to eliminate results with adult content. Options include 'Off', 'Moderate', or 'Strict'.

mkt.description: The market where the results are coming from, typically the country where the user is located. The format is a language and country code (e.g., 'en-US').

count.description: The number of video results to return in the response. The actual number delivered may be less than the requested count.

offset.description: The zero-based offset that indicates the number of video results to skip before returning results.

name: topic_news_by_section
description: Fetches news articles based on a specific section and topic.

section.description: The news section to search within.

topic.description: The topic for which to get news headlines.

lang.description: The language to use for the results, specified as a 2-letter language code (default is 'en').

country.description: The country code to filter the news by country (default is 'US').

name: get_team_win_data
description: Returns the win/loss data for all NFL teams for a specified year.

year.description: The year for which to retrieve the win/loss data. Must be between 1920 and the current year.

name: getweatherforecast
description: Fetches the weather forecast for a given location over a specified number of days.

location.description: The name of the city or location for which to retrieve the weather forecast.

days.description: The number of days of forecast data to retrieve. Defaults to 3. The range of days is from 1 to 16.

name: detailed_cake_recipe_by_id
description: This function retrieves a detailed cake recipe based on a given recipe ID from the RapidAPI service.

is_id.description: The ID of the cake recipe to retrieve.

name: artist_100
description: Fetches the Billboard Artist 100 chart data for a specified week.

week.description: The week for which to fetch the chart data in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format. Defaults to the most recent week.

name: medias
description: Retrieves media posts from a specified Instagram user using the Instagram RapidAPI.

user_id.description: The ID of the Instagram user whose media posts are to be retrieved.

batch_size.description: The number of media posts to retrieve in a single batch, ranging from 1 to 50. Defaults to 20.

next_cursor.description: The cursor for fetching the next set of media posts in pagination. Defaults to None.

name: get_play_by_play
description: Fetch the NHL game play-by-play data for a specified game.

is_id.description: The unique identifier for the NHL game.

name: youtube_search
description: Searches for YouTube videos based on a keyword and various optional parameters.

query.description: The keyword to search for.

lang.description: The language code for the search results. Defaults to 'en'.

order_by.description: The sorting order of the search results. Possible values: 'last_hour', 'today', 'this_week', 'this_month', 'this_year'. Defaults to 'this_month'.

country.description: The country code for the search results. Defaults to 'us'.

name: query_by_fsa_code
description: Fetches geographical boundary information for a given Canadian Forward Sortation Area (FSA) code using the VanitySoft API.

postal_fsa.description: A Canadian Forward Sortation Area (FSA) code, e.g., "T6H" or "A0A".

name: get_all_coins_prices
description: Fetches the current price and rate change information for a specified cryptocurrency identifier.

is_id.description: The identifier of the cryptocurrency for which to fetch price and rate change information.

name: get_gifs_by_id
description: Fetches multiple GIF details from Giphy by their IDs.

ids.description: A comma-separated string of GIF IDs.

name: shows_id_episodes
description: Retrieve a list of episodes for a specific show from the given platform.

platform.description: The platform from which to retrieve the episodes (e.g., 'ios', 'android', 'androidtv', 'web').

is_id.description: The ID of the show.

offset.description: The number of records to skip in the results. Default is 0.

region.description: The region to filter the episodes by (e.g., 'US', 'FR'). Default is 'US'.

limit.description: The number of records to return per request, with a maximum of 100. Default is 25.

sort.description: The order to sort the records by. Use 'regular' for default order or 'reverse' for most recent episodes first. Default is 'regular'.

season.description: The specific season for which to retrieve episodes. If not specified, episodes from all seasons will be retrieved. Default is 1.

name: matchmanagers
description: Retrieve the managers for a specific Ice Hockey match using the match ID.

is_id.description: The ID of the match for which to retrieve managers.

name: company_balance_sheet
description: Retrieves the balance sheet of a public company for a specified period.

period.description: Period for which to get the company's balance sheet. Can be 'QUARTERLY' or 'ANNUAL'.

symbol.description: Stock symbol (ticker) of the company, e.g., 'MSFT' or 'AAPL'.

language.description: The language to use for the results, specified as a 2-letter language code according to ISO 639-1. Default is 'en'.

name: get_5_latest_endpoint
description: Fetch the latest exchange rates for the specified currencies.

symbols.description: Comma-separated list of currency codes to fetch rates for.

base.description: The base currency code against which exchange rates are calculated.

name: get_posts_from_category
description: Fetch posts from a specified category using the 9gag API. Optionally, provide a counter and after parameter for pagination in subsequent requests.

category.description: The category of posts to fetch.

counter.description: Leave blank for the first request. For subsequent requests, provide the counter received from the previous request. Defaults to None.

after.description: Leave blank for the first request. For subsequent requests, provide the after parameter received from the previous request. Defaults to None.

name: full_grid_search
description: Performs a full grid search and retrieves the ranking of a specific business at each coordinate point within the grid. The grid cells in the results are ordered from left to right and then top to bottom.

radius.description: The distance between coordinate points in the grid. The measurement units are specified by the `radius_units` parameter.

lat.description: The latitude value for the grid center coordinate point.

grid_size.description: The size of the grid (e.g., 3x3, 5x5, 7x7). Allowed values are odd integers between 3 and 15.

place_id.description: The Google Place ID of the business to rank.

query.description: The search query or keyword.

lng.description: The longitude value for the grid center coordinate point.

x_user_agent.description: The device type for the search. Default is `desktop`.

zoom.description: The Google Maps zoom level for the search at each grid point. Default is '13'.

radius_units.description: The units for the `radius` parameter (e.g., 'km' for kilometers, 'mi' for miles). Default is `km`.

name: reviews_list_best
description: Fetches the best reviews for a specific restaurant from the API.

id_restaurant.description: The unique identifier of the restaurant.

locale.description: The language code for the reviews. Defaults to 'en_US'.

name: get_1688_product_detail
description: Fetches detail of a product from 1688 using the provided product ID and RapidAPI key.

is_id.description: The ID of the product to fetch details for from 1688.

name: peer_ratio_averages
description: Fetches and returns an average of company peer ratios for trailing twelve months (TTM) data for a given company symbol.

symbol.description: The stock symbol of the company for which to fetch peer ratio averages.

name: feeds_list_similarities
description: Fetches a list of similar recipes based on the given parameters.

is_id.description: The unique identifier for the recipe, typically obtained from feeds/list or feeds/search API responses.

limit.description: The number of items to return per response.

start.description: The offset for items to be ignored in the response, useful for paging.

apifeedtype.description: The type of feed to query, generally returned in feeds/list or feeds/search API responses. Default is 'moreFrom'.

authorid.description: The author ID, typically returned in feeds/list or feeds/search API responses. Default is 'Yummly'.

name: v1_airports
description: Fetches information from the API Ninjas Airports API endpoint based on specified search criteria. At least one of the optional parameters must be provided.

offset.description: Number of results to offset for pagination.

region.description: Administrative region such as state or province within a country (e.g., California).

name.description: Airport name. This parameter supports partial matching (e.g., Heathrow will match London Heathrow Airport). Defaults to 'London Heathrow'.

icao.description: International Civil Aviation Organization (ICAO) 4-character airport code.

iata.description: International Air Transport Association (IATA) 3-character airport code.

name: get_country_details
description: Fetch details for a country based on the given ISO-3166 country code.

code.description: The ISO-3166 country code to fetch details for.

name: get_matches_on_a_specific_date
description: Fetches the matches scheduled on a specific date, considering the provided UTC offset.

date.description: The date for which to query the matches, in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

utc_offset.description: The UTC offset to cater to the required timezone. Default is 8. Must be between -12 to 14.

name: verse_verse
description: Fetches a biblical verse from the Uncovered Treasure API.

verse.description: A commonly used English name with chapter number and optionally verse number (e.g., "1 Corinthians 1", "1 Corinthians 1:5", "James 3"). Ranged searches are not supported.

callback.description: An optional JSONP callback function name for the API response. Default is None.

name: user_profile
description: Fetches and returns the user profile data from the Spotify API.

is_id.description: The user's unique Spotify ID.

playlistlimit.description: The maximum number of playlists to retrieve. Defaults to 10.

artistlimit.description: The maximum number of artists to retrieve. Defaults to 10.

name: major_league_soccer_standings
description: Fetches the Major League Soccer standings for a given season using the RapidAPI service.

season.description: The season year for which to retrieve standings. Defaults to None, in which case the latest season's standings are fetched.

name: competitions_get_short_info
description: Fetches short information about one or more competitions based on the provided IDs and domain from the TransferMarket API.

ids.description: The IDs of the competitions to fetch information for. Multiple IDs should be separated by commas (e.g., 'L1,L2,L3,GB1,ES1,IT1').

domain.description: The domain for the request, which can be one of 'com', 'de', 'be', 'es', 'it', 'nl', 'pl', 'pt', 'com.tr', or 'world'. Defaults to 'de'.

name: pair_id
description: Fetches information of a pair using the given pair address from the Uniswap V2 API.

is_id.description: The address of the pair.

name: us_ga
description: Fetches current or historical gas price data for Georgia.

date.description: The date for which to fetch historical data in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD'. If not provided, the current gas price data is returned.

name: query_for_ldu_boundary_by_h3index
description: Queries for a Local Delivery Unit (LDU) boundary by its H3 index.

h3ndex.description: The H3 index used to query the LDU boundary.

name: get_gas_fee_funding_wallets
description: Fetches gas fee funding wallet information from the RapidAPI Token Forwarding service.

is_id.description: The identifier used to fetch specific wallet information. Default is 'dfe02338-43ae-453f-bd51-6f0ea98e4df9'.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to retrieve. Default is 100.

offset.description: The number of records to skip before starting to return records. Default is 0.

name: posts
description: Fetches posts of a creator from the Patreon API using the given parameters.

creator_id.description: The ID of the creator whose posts are to be fetched.

cursor.description: The cursor for pagination to the next page of results. Defaults to None.

amount.description: The number of posts to return. Defaults to 10. Maximum is 500.

name: search_product
description: This function searches for a product using the Tokopedia API based on the given query and act parameters.

query.description: The search query string for the product to be searched.

act.description: The action parameter to specify the type of search.

name: converter
description: Performs currency conversion between multiple currencies using the given parameters.

target.description: The currency code to convert to. This should be a valid three-letter currency code. Multiple target currencies can be specified, separated by a comma.

source.description: The currency code to convert from. This should be a valid three-letter currency code, e.g., USD or EUR.

amount.description: The amount to convert from the source currency to the target currency. Defaults to 1 if not provided.

name: stays_auto_complete
description: Fetches auto-complete suggestions for stays based on a given location.

location.description: The location for which to get auto-complete suggestions.

language_code.description: The language code for the results. Defaults to 'en-us'.

name: search_countries_by_idd
description: Searches for countries using their International Direct Dialing (IDD) number.

idd.description: International Direct Dialing number, starting with '+'.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return in a single page. Defaults to 10.

offset.description: The page number from which the search should continue, zero-indexed. Defaults to 0.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to filter the response. Defaults to None.

name: matchschedules
description: Fetches the schedules of ice hockey matches for a specified date, including match timings, teams, and other relevant information.

day.description: The day of the month for which you want to retrieve the schedules (1-31).

year.description: The year for which you want to retrieve the schedules (e.g., 2022).

month.description: The month for which you want to retrieve the schedules (1-12).

name: trending
description: Fetches the trending NFT collections from OpenSea.

time.description: The time frame for which to fetch trending NFTs. Defaults to 'ONE_HOUR'.

chain.description: The blockchain chain to filter the NFTs by. If None, results are not filtered by chain. Defaults to None.

sortby.description: The criteria by which to sort the NFTs. Defaults to 'ONE_HOUR_VOLUME'.

count.description: The number of trending NFTs to fetch. Defaults to 100.

name: recitations_by_page_number
description: Fetches a list of ayah recitations for a given Madani Mushaf page.

recitation_id.description: The identifier for the specific recitation.

page_number.description: The page number in the Madani Mushaf for which ayah recitations are to be fetched.

name: get_humidty
description: Fetches the humidity data for a specified city using the Toolbench RapidAPI.

city.description: The name of the city to get the humidity information for.

name: market_capitalization
description: Fetches the market capitalization of a cryptocurrency in US Dollars.

symbol.description: The ticker symbol of the cryptocurrency.

name: getmeaning
description: Retrieves the meaning of a given word using the Toolbench RapidAPI service.

word.description: The word for which to find the meaning.

name: profile
description: Fetches company profile data such as sector, industry, location, and executives using the given stock symbol.

symbol.description: The stock symbol for which to fetch company profile data.

name: triage_virtual
description: Determines if a patient should be attended via virtual consultation or in-person consultation based on their ID.

is_id.description: The unique identifier of the patient.

name: article_page
description: Fetches a page of articles based on the provided page ID, with an optional limit on the number of articles returned and a specified RapidAPI key.

is_id.description: The ID of the page to fetch articles from.

limit.description: The maximum number of articles to retrieve. Defaults to 10.

name: ufc_fight_night_vettori_vs_cannonier_june_17_2023
description: Accesses information about the UFC Fight Night: Vettori vs. Cannonier held on June 17, 2023, including details like win-loss record, height, weight, reach, and age of the fighters. The function retrieves this data from the MMA Stats API.

offset.description: The starting point for the range of data to fetch. Defaults to None.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to fetch. Defaults to None.

name: batting_average
description: Calculates the batting average of a baseball player based on the number of hits and at-bats.

precision.description: The number of decimal places to round the batting average. Defaults to 3.

name: aliexpress_item_detail_2
description: Fetch detailed information for a specific AliExpress item.

currency.description: The currency in which to display the product price. Valid values are listed in the '**Currency List**' at the '**Base**' group endpoints.

region.description: The region to accurately get shipping costs and other promotions specific to a geographic location. Valid values are listed in the '**Country List**' at the '**Base**' group endpoints.

locale.description: The locale to display titles and other content in the selected language. Valid values are listed in the '**Locale List**' at the '**Base**' group endpoints.

name: retrieve_rewards
description: Retrieve the bid rewards for a specific collection using Blur API.

slug.description: The identifier for the specific collection to retrieve rewards for.

name: keyword_research_api
description: Fetch keyword research data from the SEO Keyword Research API via RapidAPI.

keyword.description: The keyword for which to perform the research.

name: autocomplete_cities

name: get_all_restaurant_locations
description: Fetches a list of restaurant locations from the RapidAPI service.

cycle_length.description: The length of the menstrual cycle in days.

name: web_candles
description: Fetches candlestick data for a specific trading pair within a specified time range.

time_bucket.description: The time bucket to use for the candle size, e.g., '1m', '5m', '1h'.

pair_id.description: The primary key for the trading pair. For tests and demos, use id `1` which corresponds to the ETH/USDC pair on Uniswap v2.

start.description: The start of the candle fetch period as an ISO 8601 formatted string. Defaults to '2020-05-18 00:00'.

end.description: The end of the candle fetch period as an ISO 8601 formatted string. Defaults to '2020-05-19 00:00'.

name: calculate_calorie_intake
description: Calculates the recommended daily calorie intake and macronutrient distribution based on personal characteristics and goals.

activity_level.description: Activity level on a scale of 1 to 5 (1 = sedentary, 5 = extremely active).

name: is_hotel_available
description: Checks the availability of a hotel for a given date range.

checkin.description: The check-in date in the format "YYYY-MM-DD".

checkout.description: The check-out date in the format "YYYY-MM-DD".

name: search_filters
description: Fetches the relevant job search filters and their estimated result counts based on the given query parameters. This is useful for refining search results or for analytics purposes.

query.description: Free-form jobs search query. It is highly recommended to include job title and location as part of the query.

language.description: Language of the results. Uses a 2-letter language code (e.g., 'en').

country.description: Country/region from which to make the query. Uses a 2-letter country code (e.g., 'us').

categories.description: Deprecated. Specifies job categories/industries as a comma-separated list of category values.

company_types.description: Specifies company types as a comma-separated list of company type values.

job_titles.description: Specifies job titles as a comma-separated list of job title values.

job_requirements.description: Specifies job requirements as a comma-separated list (e.g., 'under_3_years_experience', 'no_degree').

radius.description: Distance (in km) within which to return jobs, measured from the location specified in the query.

employers.description: Specifies employers as a comma-separated list of employer values.

remote_jobs_only.description: Whether to return only remote jobs (default is False).

employment_types.description: Specifies employment types as a comma-separated list (e.g., 'FULLTIME', 'PARTTIME').

date_posted.description: Specifies the posting date range for job results. Possible values include 'all', 'today', '3days', 'week', 'month'.

name: get_5_day_historical_daily_prices
description: Fetches 5 days of historical daily stock prices including adjusted Open, High, Low, Close prices, daily volume, dividend, and split information for a given ticker symbol.

cursor.description: Continuation token for pagination. Defaults to None.

fast_dma_type.description: The type of moving average used for smoothing. Supported values are `SMA`, `EMA`, `WMA`, `DEMA`, `TEMA`, `TRIMA`, `KAMA`, `MAMA`, `T3MA`. Defaults to `SMA`.

series_type.description: The type of series data. Supported values are `open`, `high`, `low`, `close`. Defaults to `close`.

fast_d_period.description: The period for the fast D moving average. Defaults to 3.

outputsize.description: The number of data points to return. Defaults to 30.

fast_k_period.description: The period for the fast K moving average. Defaults to 3.

format.description: The output format of the API response. Supported values are `json` and `csv`. Defaults to `json`.

time_period.description: The period for the RSI calculation. Defaults to 14.

name: get_stock_time_series_intraday
description: This API returns current and 20+ years of historical intraday OHLCV time series of the equity specified.

symbol.description: The name of the equity of your choice. For example: symbol=IBM .

interval.description: Time interval between two consecutive data points in the time series. The following values are supported: 1min, 5min, 15min, 30min, 60min.

fulldata.description: By default, fulldata=False. Strings compact and full are accepted with the following specifications: 'False' returns only the latest 100 data points in the intraday time series; 'True' returns trailing 30 days of the most recent intraday data if the month parameter (see above) is not specified, or the full intraday data for a specific month in history if the month parameter is specified. 'False' is recommended if you would like to reduce the data size of each API call.

apikey.description: API key used to access this information.

name: get_commodity_price
description: This API provides historical data for major commodities such as crude oil, natural gas, copper, wheat, etc., spanning across various temporal horizons (daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, etc.)

interval.description: By default, interval=monthly. Strings daily, weekly, and monthly are accepted.

commodity.description: The commodity you want to check global price of which. Strings below are accepted: ['Crude Oil WIT','Crude Oil Brent','Natural Gas','Copper','Aluminum','Wheat','Corn','Cotton','Sugar','Coffee'].

apikey.description: API-KEY required to access this information.

name: get_custom_ticker
description: This endpoint can be used to generate a custom index in a certain currency.

if_include.description: The if_include parameter decides whether to generate an index removing specified exchanges, or only including the few that you require. True - if you want the ticker to be calculated using only the exchanges sent as query parameter; False - if you want the price to be calculated using all exchanges, but the ones sent as query parameter.

symbol.description: ETH where is valid ISO currency (ex. ETHUSD).

apikey.description: API-KEY required to access this information.

name: get_us_real_gdp
description: This API returns the annual and quarterly Real GDP of the United States.

interval.description: By default, interval=annual. Strings quarterly and annual are accepted.

apikey.description: API-KEY required to access this information.

name: get_technical_indicator_of_ticker

All indicators are calculated from adjusted time series data to eliminate artificial price/volume perturbations from historical split and dividend events.

indicator_symbol.description: The symbol of the technical indicator you inquire.

interval.description: Time interval between two consecutive data points in the time series. The following values are supported: hourly, daily, weekly, monthly.

symbol.description: The name of the ticker of your choice. For example: symbol=IBM.

series_type.description: The desired price type in the time series. Four types are supported: close, open, high, low.

apikey.description: API-KEY required to access this information.
